name: Auxos
long_description:
Auxos creates simulated audiences for marketing, product, and research teams to test their hypotheses at scale. We build custom audiences for each company to validate product, pricing, and positioning decisions before going live.

Currently, customer research is slow and expensive. Surveys and panels cost a fortune and it takes weeks to recruit, moderate, and gather insights.   

Auxos can get you population scale insights in minutes, at a fraction of the current cost.
